ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 Confirmation - Thank you for shopping with us!
ham.body:
Hello Ravi,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.com. Your order #1234567890 has been confirmed.

Item: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
Price: INR 4,499.00

Order placed: 15 April 2026, 10:32 AM

You can track your shipment here: <URL>

Thank you for choosing Amazon. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required - Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is the HR Department. We have detected an issue with the recent payroll submission. To ensure you receive your salary on time, please verify your bank account details immediately.

Click on the link below and enter your employee ID and bank details:
<URL>

Please note that failure to comply within 24 hours may result in delay of salary disbursement. This is a mandatory compliance check as per company policy.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
HR Team
